description: Require each uploader connection to declare exactly one radar device type, rd03d or ld2451, plus test_mode metadata. Add a --radar-device CLI option required for real and --test-mode runs; fake uploader must emulate the selected real device type, not a separate fake device. Register metadata with the web channel after joining radar:config, store it in presence/debug state, and return a clear device_not_registered error for config access before registration.
title: Add uploader radar device handshake
